name: healthcare_near_miss_event_marrowbridge_auto_ben
premise: Bed capacity, consent, and chart documentation are all under real-time scrutiny. Bed capacity, consent, and chart documentation are all under real-time scrutiny. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: healthcare near miss event marrowbridge auto ben. The moral tension is explicitly framed as autonomy versus beneficence: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Insurance and risk are insisting on a paper trail before any irreversible action; operations says delay costs measurable harm. The breach-notification and customer-communication clock has started; executive staff expect a single coherent position before the next press cycle. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Mei Okoye
agents.identity: I am Mei Okoye, the accountable decision-maker on this Healthcare bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes beneficence whenever someone invokes autonomy.

agents.name: Camila Chandra
agents.identity: I am Camila Chandra, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so beneficence is not sacrificed by default just because autonomy feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect beneficence.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to beneficence to secure autonomy before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The clock on this bridge is running out. With partial evidence, Mei Okoye must decide under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Mei Okoye do?
